message:
Add 15 comprehensive feature beads with 46 subtasks

New features from idea-wizard analysis:

P1 (Critical):
- bd-1iqn: Render Budget Enforcement with Graceful Degradation
- bd-1euu: Widget Error Boundaries with Recovery
- bd-3t87: Progressive Rendering for Large Content with Virtualization

P2 (Standard):
- bd-3227: Terminal Capability Auto-Upgrade with Safe Probing
- bd-2lwf: Time-Travel Debugging with Frame Snapshots
- bd-3m7u: Headless Rendering Mode for CI Testing
- bd-17ed: Input Macro Recording and Playback
- bd-17nn: Widget Introspection Debug Overlay
- bd-28jm: Smart Resize Debouncing with Placeholder
- bd-9xbn: Layout Constraint Debugger
- bd-2d2v: Cross-Terminal Clipboard Abstraction
- bd-em01: Performance Tracing with Span Support
- bd-6qxh: Frame Caching with Smart Invalidation

P3 (Extras):
- bd-3dca: Session Recording to Asciicast Format
- bd-3tiz: Composable Animation Primitives

Each parent bead has 2-6 detailed subtasks with:
- Technical design and code snippets
- Acceptance criteria
- Test requirements
- Proper dependency chains

Total beads: 233 (up from 187)
No dependency cycles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
